Table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE3

Card of table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE3

Name

RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE3

Code

RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE3

DBMS

Snowflake


Check constraint name of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE3

CKT_RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUC


Server validation rule of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE3

%RULES%


Code preview of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE3

drop table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE3 cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE3
--==============================================================
create or replace table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE3 (
RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE_KEY TEXT_255_ not null,
MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY TEXT_255_,
COUNTRY_CODE_BK TEXT_255_ not null,
PRODUCT_CODE_BK TEXT_255_ not null,
BADGE_ACTIVE_FLAG BOOLEAN,
BADGE_CODE_BK TEXT_255_ not null,
BADGE_DESCRIPTION TEXT_255_,
BADGE_NAME TEXT_255_,
BADGE_OFFLINE_DATE DATETIME,
BADGE_ONLINE_DATE DATETIME,
VALID_FROM DATETIME not null,
VALID_TO DATETIME not null,
ACTIVE_FLAG FLAG not null,
constraint PK_RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT primary key (RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE_KEY)
not enforced
);

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE3.RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE_KEY is
'PK for RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE3.MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY is
'FK to MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE3.COUNTRY_CODE_BK is
'Country where the product is available (events_country_code )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE3.PRODUCT_CODE_BK is
'Code of the product (events_products_code )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE3.BADGE_ACTIVE_FLAG is
'Badge Active (events_products_productAvailableBadges_badge_active )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE3.BADGE_CODE_BK is
'Badge Code (events_products_productAvailableBadges_badge_code )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE3.BADGE_DESCRIPTION is
'Badge Description (EN) (events_products_productAvailableBadges_badge_description_en )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE3.BADGE_NAME is
'Badge Name (EN) (events_products_productAvailableBadges_badge_name_en )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE3.BADGE_OFFLINE_DATE is
'Badge Offline Date (events_products_productAvailableBadges_offlineDate )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE3.BADGE_ONLINE_DATE is
'Badge Online Date (events_products_productAvailableBadges_onlineDate )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE3.VALID_FROM is
'It indicates from when the record is active (VALID_FROM: Indicates the dattime when the validity of the record starts. As it is SCD Type 2 it''s derived from the __LOAD_TS. )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE3.VALID_TO is
'It indicates till when the record is Active (VALID_TO: Indicates the dattime till when the record is/was valid. As it is SCD Type 2 it''s derived from the __LOAD_TS. In case record is still valid it should contain date 9999-12-31)';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE3.ACTIVE_FLAG is
' It indicates if the record is active (ACTIVE_FLAG: Active Indicator. True value only for only the most recent record. All others being updated as False.)';

Column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE_KEY of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE3

Card of the column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE_KEY of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE3

Name

RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE_KEY

Code

RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE_KEY

Data Type

TEXT

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE_KEY of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE3

MD5 Based Composite Hash Key Comprising of

EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_PRODUCTAVAILABLEBADGES_BADGE_CODE , __LOAD_TS


Check constraint name of the column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE_KEY of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE3

CKC_RDE_PRODUCT_CATAL_RDE_PROD

Column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE3

Card of the column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE3

Name

MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY

Code

MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY

Data Type

TEXT

Mandatory

No


Description of the column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE3

LEFT JOIN T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG pc

ON EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE = pc.EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE

AND EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE = pc.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE

 

and __LOAD_TS in <T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG.__LOAD_TS , T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VALID_TO)

 

Detailed logic in attached query

Name

VALID_FROM

Code

VALID_FROM

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_FROM of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE3

VALID_FROM: Indicates the dattime when the validity of the record starts. As it is SCD Type 2 it's derived from the __LOAD_TS.

Name

VALID_TO

Code

VALID_TO

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_TO of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE3

VALID_TO: Indicates the dattime till when the record is/was valid. As it is SCD Type 2 it's derived from the __LOAD_TS. In case record is still valid it should contain date 9999-12-31

ACTIVE_FLAG

ACTIVE_FLAG

Data Type

BOOLEAN

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column ACTIVE_FLAG of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE3

ACTIVE_FLAG: Active Indicator. True value only for only the most recent record. All others being updated as False.

drop constraint PK_RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRODUCT;

Name
